scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix adminfrontend && npm install --prefix adminbackend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run start --prefix backend"
scripts.dev:admin: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix adminfrontend" "npm run start --prefix adminbackend"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run start --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix adminfrontend" "npm run start --prefix adminbackend"
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:adminfrontend
